name: DotLine
short_description: DotLine is a challenging minimalist puzzle game. Click on puzzle elements to drive the ball to the exit without falling into the void. Completing the game will require fast thinking and reaction !
detailed_description:
Dotline is a challenging minimalist Puzzle Game

Click on puzzle elements to drive the ball to the exit without falling into the void.
Try and retry to win and have the best possible score.

Features

  • 8 acts for more than 70 standard levels
  • 9 bonus levels to unlock
  • challenge levels
  • stars, snowflakes and flashes to catch to get more score points
  • accelerate (space bar) to win more score points
  • Steam achievements

supported_languages: English, French, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Russian, German, Turkish, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Swedish, Ukrainian
